sections.title: Act 2, Parts 3–4: Crossbell & Liberating Trista
sections.content:
# Act 2, Parts 3–4 — Crossbell Operations & Liberating Trista

The final parts of Act 2 involve major story operations across multiple regions, culminating in the liberation of **Thors Military Academy** in Trista.

## Act 2, Part 3 — Regional Operations

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-part-3-start | Act 2 Part 3 Begins -->

### Courageous Preparations
- Talk to **Towa** for new locations (Eisengard Range, Roer Region)
- Interact with classmates/faculty to update character profiles
- Check mission list for all available quests

### Books (Missable!)
| Item | Location | Missable? |
|------|----------|----------|
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11 (Book)** | Talk to **Rex** at Schwarz Drache Barrier (12/23) | Yes — NPC dialogue only |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12 (Book)** | Talk to **Maicel** at Alouette Inn, Bareahard Artisans' Street (12/26) | Yes — NPC dialogue only |
| **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13 (Book)** | Talk to **Spare** at Crescent Moon Inn, Aurochs Fort (12/27) | Yes — NPC dialogue only |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint #13 (Book)** | Buy from Fortnum Books, Bareahard (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |
| **Gambler Jack Reprint - Finale (Book)** | Buy from Fortnum Books, Bareahard (revisit via Courageous) | Yes |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — Three Gambler Jack II chapters become available during Parts 3–4. Talk to specific NPCs at each location.

### Side Quests
| Quest | Details |
|-------|--------|
| **The Sweetest of Challenges** | Visit towns, taste-test sweets with NPCs |
| **Gone Air** | Investigate Roer Airport for a missing airship |
| **Kreuzen for a Bruisin'** | Win a battle challenge at Kreuzen |

> 🏆 **Achievement: Honor Roll** — Complete all available quests including hidden ones in Part 4.

### Bonding Events (Pre-Trista)

Before commencing the Trista operation, you receive **5 Bonding Points** aboard the Courageous:

**Available characters:** Full roster of recruited Class VII members

- This is one of the last major bonding opportunities before the Finale
- Characters with higher total Link EXP will have expanded dialogue options
- **Final cutscene partner** is heavily influenced by these last bonding choices

> Save before spending. This determines your ending partner alongside Epilogue bonding.

### Spirit Shrines

Explore **Spirit Shrines** for Zemurian Ore — crucial for reforging Valimar's sword. **Emma and Celine must be in your party** to enter any shrine's Proving Grounds. You clear one shrine in Part 3 and the remaining three in Part 4.

| Shrine | Element | Location | Boss Guardian |
|--------|---------|----------|---------------|
| **Terra Shrine** | Earth | Garrelia Byroad (Legram region) | Magic Knight Direwolf |
| **Aqua Shrine** | Water | Ebel Highway (near Legram) | Magic Knight Heavy Ruby |
| **Ignis Shrine** | Fire | Nortia Highway (near Schwarz Drache Barrier) | Magic Knight Isra-Zeriel |
| **Aria Shrine** | Wind | Nord Highlands (northeast) | Grianos-Aura |

**Shrine Walkthrough:**
1. Enter with Emma and Celine in your party
2. Navigate the Proving Grounds (puzzles and enemies)
3. Defeat the boss guardian at the shrine depths
4. Examine the giant crystal after the boss to collect **Zemurian Ore**
5. Return to **George** aboard the Courageous

> ⚠️ Completing a shrine's Proving Grounds advances the story for that day, locking out remaining side quests. Finish all other quests before entering a shrine.

**Reward per shrine:** 1 Zemurian Ore + unique quartz

### Cryptids — December 23

Two additional Cryptid bosses become available on December 23:

- **Agnagarn** at Nortia Highway 2 (~264,012 HP) — powerful Arts damage. Drops **Searing Sun Gem** (Lost Arts quartz). Bring arts reflect (Emma's Crescent Shell).
- **Lindbaum** at Eisengard Range (~274,348 HP) — the hardest Cryptid. Powerful physical and AoE attacks. Drops **Roaring Dragon Gem** (Lost Arts quartz). Have solid healing and buffing strategy.

> Defeating all cryptids earns bonus rewards from Princess Alfin.

### Boss: Duvalie & Stahlritter

<!-- checkpoint: crossbell-boss | Crossbell Boss Defeated -->

Major boss sequence involving **Duvalie the Swift**, members of the **Stahlritter**, and **Altina Orion**.

- **Strategy:** Start with preemptive buffs. Use "Fortress" Quartz or accessories to resist ailments. Duvalie is fast — keep her debuffed. Focus fire one enemy at a time.
- **Multiple fights in sequence** — manage CP carefully, don't blow all S-Crafts in the first fight.

> **Save before entering Crossbell operations.** Multiple consecutive boss fights with limited recovery.

## Act 2, Part 4 — Liberating Trista

<!-- checkpoint: liberating-trista | Begin Liberating Trista -->

### Pre-Battle Setup (December 30)

After completing Spirit Shrines 2, the story quest **"Liberating Trista"** begins.

- Speak to **Towa** and pick "Commence Operation" to start
- **Monica** (4th floor) — gives a **Kaiser Burger** before the battle
- Play **Blade II** with one last character for Link EXP

### Side Quests (Available before commencing)
| Quest | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| **Mist Opportunity** | Available before operation |
| **Canyon, or CAN'Tyon?** | Available before operation |
| **Hearts in Harmony** | Available before operation |
| **Father's Pocket Watch (Hidden)** | Multi-step quest: Start from Colette in Roer → Jackass's Repair Shop → Roer Institute (George, need part) → Sachsen Mine (Munk, get Orbal Spring) → back to Jackass → return to Colette. Requires Alisa in party. |

> ⚠️ **Point of no return:** Once you "Commence Operation", all remaining side quests become unavailable. Complete everything first!

> 🏆 **Achievement: Honor Roll** — Complete ALL quests including Father's Pocket Watch (hidden). Requires Alisa in your party.

<!-- checkpoint: trista-pre-battle-done | Pre-Battle Preparations Done -->

### The Liberation Battle

You control **two teams** simultaneously:
- **Team A:** Rean + Towa (forced) + your choices
- **Team B:** Angelica (forced) + your choices

> Equip all party members before commencing — no gear changes during consecutive battles.

### Battle Sequence

1. **Mech Battle:** Multiple Soldat mechs (Goliath B, Kestrel B) using Valimar with Team A
2. **Team B Fight:** Vincent, Sariffa, and two others (varies by party lineup: Ferris/Lambert/Friedel/Edel)
3. **Team A Fight:** Patrick, Celestin, and variant opponents

**Tips:**
- Have offensive quartz on strong attackers (Rean, Laura, Gaius, Millium)
- Support/cancel quartz for Emma/Fie
- Ensure everyone's ARCUS slots are upgraded to Level 2
- Sara does NOT participate in these battles

<!-- checkpoint: trista-liberated | Trista Liberated -->

> After liberating Trista, major story events play leading into the Finale.

<!-- checkpoint: act-2-complete | Act 2 Complete -->

sections.title: Finale: Forward, Relentlessly
sections.content:
# Finale — Forward, Relentlessly

The Finale takes you to the **Infernal Castle**, a massive multi-floor dungeon with the game's most challenging boss gauntlet. Before entering, complete all remaining side content in Trista and choose your bond partner.

<!-- checkpoint: finale-start | Trista Pre-Castle Activities -->

## Pre-Castle: Trista Activities

Before entering the Infernal Castle, take care of final side content:

### Side Quests
- **My Jormungand Don't Want None**
- **Sachsen Violence**
- **Nord by Nord-east**
- **Ymir, Far, Wherever You Are**
- **Absentee Father** (hidden quest — easily missed!) — Talk to **Father Paulo** in **Trista Chapel**. Follow the trail of priests: Celdic Chapel (Father Zirbel) → Bareahard Cathedral (Archbishop Amon) → Legram Chapel (Father Hamilcar) → Roer Cathedral (Archbishop Homs) → Ymir Chapel (Father Bernard). **Reward:** 4,500 Mira, Acala Gem, 4 AP. Bring Gaius for extra dialogue.

### Collectibles
- **Imperial Chronicle - Issue 6** — Buy from any news store (Keynes' Bookstore in Trista, or Literature Club on the Courageous)
- **Gambler Jack II Ch.14** — Talk to Karol
- **Tomato Pot (Recipe)** — Talk to Lotte
- **Medal of Love** — Receive from Princess Alfin

### Chosen Partner Event
Speak with your chosen bond partner for a special scene. Requires **Link Level 6** and **6000 EXP** with that character. This determines your ending.

> Complete ALL quests and collectibles before proceeding. Entering the castle is the point of no return.

## Preparation

**Before entering:**
- Stock up on healing items (Celestial Balm, EP Charge III, Reviving Balm)
- Optimize your top 8 characters (you'll control two 4-person teams)
- Ensure at least one AoE healer per team
- Equip status recovery accessories and ailment-resist quartz
- Have plenty of Curia Balm and S-Craft items

> **Save before entering the Infernal Castle.** This is the final dungeon. There is no going back.

<!-- checkpoint: enter-infernal-castle | Enter the Infernal Castle -->

## Infernal Castle Structure

The castle is divided into strata with increasingly powerful enemies and bosses:

### 1st Stratum
- Standard encounters with powerful enemies
- Collect all treasure chests on side paths
- **Boss: Bleublanc & Duvalie** — Bleublanc uses illusion tactics and status effects. Duvalie is a fast melee attacker with high evasion. Prioritize Bleublanc first to stop his support abilities, then focus Duvalie.

<!-- checkpoint: 1st-stratum-cleared | 1st Stratum Cleared — Bleublanc & Duvalie Defeated -->

### 2nd Stratum
- **Fie is mandatory** for this stratum
- Puzzle mechanic: **Eye switches** — activate them in the correct order to open paths
- Both teams face mid-bosses and strong archaisms
- **Boss: Xeno & Leonidas** — Xeno is a ranged attacker; Leonidas is a tank with powerful physical strikes. Focus Xeno first as his ranged attacks are harder to mitigate. Use Fie's speed to maintain turn advantage.

<!-- checkpoint: 2nd-stratum-cleared | 2nd Stratum Cleared — Xeno & Leonidas Defeated -->

### 3rd Stratum
- Monster barriers block your path — destroy them in order: **left, right, center, center**
- Each team faces unique enemy series
- **Boss: McBurn** (solo boss)
- **HP:** ~120,000 (Normal)
- **Recommended Level:** 70+
- **Key Moves:** Infernal Flames (fire AoE), Burning Rage (self-buff at 50% HP), Incandescent Lion (S-Craft)
- **Strategy:** Equip fire-resist accessories and Burn immunity. He enters an empowered state at 50% HP with devastating AoE — use S-Crafts to burst through this phase. Water/Earth arts are slightly effective. Arts Guards/Reflects are valuable. Keep HP topped off at all times.

<!-- checkpoint: 3rd-stratum-cleared | 3rd Stratum Cleared — McBurn Defeated -->

### Highest Stratum
- Final floor before the endgame bosses
- **Boss: Crow & Vita**
- **Crow HP:** ~65,000 (Normal) — Physical attacker with powerful S-Craft "Rebellion Storm"
- **Vita HP:** ~56,000 (Normal) — Devastating arts caster with wide-area attacks
- **Recommended Level:** 70+
- **Strategy:** Prioritize **Vita first** — interrupt her cast times with S-Crafts or impede/delay crafts. Her arts are harder to mitigate than Crow's physical attacks. Debuff Crow's ATK and keep party HP above 50% to survive his S-Craft burst. Use Overdrive for emergency healing or burst damage.

<!-- checkpoint: highest-stratum-cleared | Highest Stratum Cleared — Crow & Vita Defeated -->

## Final Boss: Vermillion Apocalypse

<!-- checkpoint: final-boss | Vermillion Apocalypse Defeated -->

- **HP:** ~240,000 (Normal, across both phases)
- **Recommended Level:** 70–75+

**Phase 1:** Normal form with physical attacks and crafts.
- Keep party HP high, apply defensive buffs (Shining/Zeroshield)
- Use Burst and Rush opportunities for coordinated damage
- Apply stat debuffs (STR Down, SPD Down) early

**Phase 2:** (Triggers after HP threshold) — AoE attacks intensify, self-buffs activate
- Watch for **Demon's Gaze** — massive single-target attack
- Arts Guards/Reflects are extremely valuable here
- Protect low-HP characters, use S-Crafts to interrupt
- Keep healing constant with your designated healer
- Equip Burn/Freeze immunity and Deathblow protection accessories

## Divine Knight Battle: Valimar vs Ordine (Crow)

<!-- checkpoint: divine-knight-ordine | Valimar vs Ordine Complete -->

After defeating the Vermillion Apocalypse, Rean pilots **Valimar** in a one-on-one Divine Knight duel against **Crow's Ordine**.

- This is a mech battle using Valimar's combat system
- Attack Ordine's weak points when they flash
- Guard when Ordine telegraphs powerful attacks
- Use Valimar's special attacks for burst damage during openings
- Heal Valimar between exchanges — the fight is long

> Your chosen bond partner affects the final cutscene. The ending varies based on who has the highest affection.

<!-- checkpoint: finale-complete | Finale Complete -->

checkpoints.label: Highest Stratum Cleared — Crow & Vita Defeated

🏆 **The Return of Rean QUARTZ-er reminder:** The Infernal Castle is a ONE-TIME dungeon. Open EVERY treasure chest on every stratum — master quartz found here cannot be obtained after leaving.
steps.note: Explore all side paths in each stratum before advancing to the next. This is your last chance for dungeon-exclusive master quartz.

steps.text: ⚠️ **POINT OF NO RETURN:** Entering the Infernal Castle is final. Complete all Trista activities first.
**Save before entering.** Keep a backup save outside the castle.
Clear the **1st Stratum** — collect all chests on side paths.
**BOSS: Bleublanc & Duvalie** — Prioritize Bleublanc first (illusions/status effects), then focus Duvalie (fast melee, high evasion).
Clear the **2nd Stratum** with **Fie** (mandatory). Activate **eye switches** in correct order to open paths.
**BOSS: Xeno & Leonidas** — Focus Xeno first (ranged attacker), then Leonidas (tank). Use Fie's speed for turn advantage.
Clear the **3rd Stratum** — destroy monster barriers in order: **left, right, center, center**.

**BOSS: McBurn** (solo, ~120,000 HP) — Equip fire-resist accessories and Burn immunity. Key moves: Infernal Flames (AoE), Burning Rage (self-buff at 50% HP), Incandescent Lion (S-Craft). Burst through empowered phase with S-Crafts. Water/Earth arts effective. Recommended level 70+.
steps.note: Extremely dangerous. Keep party HP topped off at all times.

steps.text: Advance through the **Highest Stratum** to reach the final bosses.

**BOSS: Crow (~65,000 HP) & Vita (~56,000 HP)** — Focus **Vita first** (arts caster). Interrupt her casting with S-Crafts or impede/delay crafts. Debuff Crow's ATK, keep HP above 50% to survive his "Rebellion Storm" S-Craft. Recommended level 70+.

**FINAL BOSS: Vermillion Apocalypse** (~240,000 HP, recommended level 70–75+) — Phase 1: buff/debuff steady, use Burst/Rush opportunities. Phase 2: watch for Demon's Gaze, use Arts Guards/Reflects, S-Craft interrupts. Equip Burn/Freeze immunity. Keep healer alive at all costs.
**DIVINE KNIGHT: Valimar vs Ordine (Crow)** — Attack weak points when they flash. Guard telegraphed attacks. Use special attacks during openings. Heal Valimar between exchanges.
steps.note: Bond partner choice affects ending cutscene.

sections.title: Divertissement: Occupation of Crossbell
sections.content:
# Divertissement — Occupation of Crossbell

The Divertissement is a unique interlude chapter starring **Lloyd Bannings** and **Rixia Mao** from the Crossbell arc (Trails from Zero / Trails to Azure). Lloyd and Rixia must infiltrate **Geofront Sector E** to erase sensitive Crossbell citizen data before it falls into the wrong hands. This is a dungeon-focused chapter with no side quests.

<!-- checkpoint: divertissement-start | Divertissement Begins -->

## Party

You control only **Lloyd** and **Rixia** — a two-person party. No other members join.

> These characters have their own equipment, orbments, and craft sets separate from Rean's party. Familiarize yourself with their abilities.

### Key Abilities
- **Lloyd's S-Craft: Raging Sun** — Powerful AoE attack for clearing groups
- **Lloyd's Burning Heart** — Self-buff that boosts attack and speed
- **Rixia's Vanishing Stance** — Grants invulnerability for a set duration; use before dangerous enemy attacks
- Place **Lloyd and Rixia in the back row** for defensive positioning

> ⚠️ **No shops are available during the Divertissement.** You must rely entirely on dungeon drops and chest items. Manage your resources carefully.

## Geofront Sector E

<!-- checkpoint: geofront-sector-e | Enter Geofront Sector E -->

The chapter takes place entirely within **Geofront Sector E**, an underground dungeon beneath Crossbell. There is no city exploration — you proceed directly into the Geofront.

### Treasure Chests (16 total)
Key items to look for:
- **Celestial Balm EX ×3** — Premium healing
- **EP Charge IV ×2** — Arts restoration
- **Grail Locket** — Powerful accessory
- **Seven Dragon Armor** — Top-tier armor
- **Bakuya** — Weapon
- **Strega-S** — Weapon
- **Emergency Puppet** — Auto-revive accessory
- **Zeus Gem** — Quartz
- **Strega-P** — Weapon
- **Pentagon** — Accessory
- **Heavenly Robe** — Armor
- **Tear All Balm** — Full party heal
- **Zeram Capsule** — Stat boost

> Explore every side path to find all 16 chests. These items are your only source of upgrades.

### Enemy Types
Enemies in Geofront Sector E include:
- **Grass Drome / Giant Drome** — Standard melee enemies
- **Needle Rat** — Fast attackers
- **Metal Bat** — Durable physical enemies
- **Greedy Mosquito / Superior Mosquito** — Can drain HP/EP
- **Blood Monad** — Magic-based enemy
- **Torso RR** — Mechanical enemy
- **Spike Kraken** — Strong water-type enemy
- **Crystal Medusa** — Petrification attacks; high priority target

> Scan all new enemies with Battle Scope for Monster Notebook completion.

<!-- checkpoint: geofront-cleared | Geofront Sector E Cleared -->

## Boss: Rean Schwarzer & Altina Orion

<!-- checkpoint: boss-rean-altina | Boss: Rean & Altina -->

**The boss fight of the Divertissement pits Lloyd and Rixia against Rean and Altina.**

| Boss | HP | Key Attacks |
|------|-----|-------------|
| **Rean Schwarzer** | ~75,000 | Arc Slash, Flame Impact, S-Craft |
| **Altina Orion** | ~63,000 | Arts casting, support abilities, shield |

**Strategy:**
1. Focus on **Altina** first — her support abilities and healing make the fight harder if left alive
2. Use **Rixia's Vanishing Stance** before Rean's S-Craft to avoid massive damage
3. Use **Lloyd's Burning Heart** buff early for sustained damage output
4. Lloyd's **Raging Sun** S-Craft deals heavy damage — save CP for critical moments
5. Guard when Rean telegraphs powerful attacks
6. Heal frequently — don't hesitate to use all consumables, this is the chapter's final fight

> **Save before entering the boss area.** This fight can be punishing with only two characters and no shop access.

After victory, story scenes resolve the Crossbell situation and you return to Rean's party for the Epilogue.

<!-- checkpoint: divertissement-complete | Divertissement Complete -->

steps.text: Familiarize yourself with **Lloyd** and **Rixia's** abilities — they have unique equipment and crafts separate from Rean's party.
⚠️ **No shops are available during the Divertissement.** Rely on dungeon drops and chest items only. Manage resources carefully.
Place **Lloyd and Rixia in the back row** for better defensive positioning.
**Lloyd:** Use **Burning Heart** for ATK/SPD buff. Save S-Craft **Raging Sun** for tough fights or the boss.
**Rixia:** Use **Vanishing Stance** for invulnerability before dangerous enemy attacks.
Explore **Geofront Sector E** thoroughly — find all **16 treasure chests** including Celestial Balm EX ×3, Grail Locket, Emergency Puppet, and Seven Dragon Armor.
Scan all enemies with Battle Scope: Grass Drome, Needle Rat, Metal Bat, Greedy Mosquito, Blood Monad, Torso RR, Spike Kraken, Giant Drome, Superior Mosquito, Crystal Medusa.
steps.note: Crystal Medusa can petrify — prioritize it in encounters.

steps.text: **Save before the boss area.** The fight is punishing with only two characters and no shop access.

**BOSS: Rean Schwarzer (~75,000 HP) & Altina Orion (~63,000 HP)** — Focus Altina first (support/healing). Use Rixia's Vanishing Stance before Rean's S-Craft. Use Lloyd's Burning Heart buff and Raging Sun S-Craft for burst damage.
steps.note: Use all consumables freely — this is the chapter's final fight.

sections.title: Epilogue: Winter's End
sections.content:
# Epilogue — Winter's End

The Epilogue wraps up the story and features the **Reverie Corridor** — a challenging 16-floor dungeon inside the Old Schoolhouse. This is post-game content focused on powerful elemental bosses, ultimate weapons, and final character moments.

<!-- checkpoint: epilogue-start | Epilogue Begins -->

## Return to Thors

After waking in Ymir, regroup with your party and return to **Thors Military Academy**. The Old Schoolhouse basement opens for the final time.

## Epilogue Side Quests

Complete these quests before entering the Reverie Corridor:

- **Class Warfare** — From Instructor Thomas
- **Junk Wanted** — From Becky at Trista Station
- **Angler Management** — From Kenneth
- **Swimming Lessons: The Return** (hidden quest — easily missed!) — Go to the **Thors Academy Gymnasium Pool** and talk to the instructor. Coach classmates through swimming drills by choosing the correct advice for each student. **Reward:** Proxy Puppet (auto-revive accessory) + AP.
- **The Race to End All Races** (story quest)

<!-- checkpoint: epilogue-quests | Epilogue Side Quests Complete -->

### Collectibles
- **Imperial Chronicle Issue #7** — Buy from the Student Union General Store. Critical for the Lending Library achievement!

## Final Bonding Events & Last-Chance Collectibles

### Bonding Points (Final Opportunity)
You receive your **last Bonding Points** in the Epilogue. Spend them on the character you want as your ending partner:

- The character with the **highest total affection** across all Acts determines your final cutscene
- This is your absolute last chance to influence the ending
- **Save before spending** to see different endings

### Last-Chance Books & Recipes

> ⚠️ **FINAL CHECK:** Before entering the Reverie Corridor, verify you have collected ALL missable items:

**Books checklist:**
- All Gambler Jack II chapters (1-13 + Finale)
- All Gambler Jack Reprints (#1-#13 + Finale) — available from shops in each town visited
- All Imperial Chronicle issues (#1-#7)

> **Note:** Red Moon Rose is NOT a collectible in Trails of Cold Steel II (it was in the first game only). The Lending Library achievement in CS2 requires Gambler Jack II, Gambler Jack Reprints, and Imperial Chronicle issues.

**Recipes checklist:**
- All recipes from each town visited
- Check recipe list in Camp Menu — any gaps mean you missed one

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lending Library** — If you're missing ANY book, this is your last chance. Some NPCs aboard the Courageous carry final-chapter books.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Wartime Rationer** — Check the recipe menu. If you're short, revisit towns via Courageous before entering the corridor.

## Phantasmal Mirrors

**Phantasmal Mirrors** are available for 200,000 mira each. These special items transform characters into guest fighters with fixed loadouts:
- **Crow** / **Vita** / **Altina** / **Lloyd** / **Rixia**

Each mirror character comes with preset equipment, orbments, and crafts. They're powerful additions for corridor runs.

## Reverie Corridor

<!-- checkpoint: reverie-corridor | Enter Reverie Corridor -->

The Reverie Corridor is a 16-floor dungeon with elemental themes and powerful bosses.

### Structure
- **Floors 1-4: Earth** themed — Earth-element enemies and terrain
- **Floors 5-8: Water** themed — Water-element enemies and terrain
- **Floors 9-12: Fire** themed — Fire-element enemies and terrain
- **Floors 13-16: Wind** themed — Wind-element enemies and terrain
- Each set of 4 floors ends with an **Elemental Lord** boss
- After Floor 16: **Boundless Cathedral** — the true final area

### Corridor Mechanics
- **Universal Overdrive:** All characters can enter Overdrive with any partner (not limited to specific link pairs)
- **Triple Link EXP:** Link experience gain is tripled inside the corridor
- **Chest Respawn:** Treasure chests respawn on re-entry — farm valuable items between runs

### Zemurian Ore Shard System
- Each Elemental Lord drops **1 Zemurian Ore Shard** (4 per full run)
- **3 Shards = 1 Zemurian Ore** — used to forge ultimate weapons
- Multiple corridor runs required for full ultimate weapon set

### Tips for the Corridor
- **Grind as needed** — deeper floors provide the best EXP in the game
- Keep equipment and quartz updated between runs
- Equip elemental resistance matching the current floor theme
- Use Lost Arts on Elemental Lords — they're devastating but single-use per corridor run

## Elemental Lord Bosses

Each set of 4 floors ends with an Elemental Lord:

<!-- checkpoint: earth-lord-defeated | Earth Lord Defeated (Floor 4) -->

- **Earth Lord** (after Floor 4) — Exploit wind-element weaknesses

<!-- checkpoint: water-lord-defeated | Water Lord Defeated (Floor 8) -->

- **Water Lord** (after Floor 8) — Exploit fire-element weaknesses

<!-- checkpoint: fire-lord-defeated | Fire Lord Defeated (Floor 12) -->

- **Fire Lord** (after Floor 12) — Exploit water-element weaknesses

<!-- checkpoint: wind-lord-defeated | Wind Lord Defeated (Floor 16) -->

- **Wind Lord** (after Floor 16) — Exploit earth-element weaknesses

Each Elemental Lord drops a **Zemurian Ore Shard**. Use elemental counter-quartz and arts for each fight.

## Boundless Cathedral & Final Boss: Loa Luciferia

<!-- checkpoint: loa-luciferia | Loa Luciferia Defeated -->

After clearing all 16 floors, enter the **Boundless Cathedral** for the true final battle.

### Final Boss: Loa Luciferia

| Stat | Value |
|------|-------|
| Level | 150 |
| HP | 722,250 |
| STR | 3,900 |
| DEF | 3,300 |

**Recommended Level:** 120+

**Key Mechanics:**
- Summons **Sacred Fragment ×6** — Destroy these quickly or they empower the boss
- Uses **Vanish** — Can remove party members from battle entirely
- Uses **Chrono Break** — Resets party turn order; devastating if timed poorly
- Heavy status ailment attacks throughout

**Strategy:**
1. **Vanish Protection:** Equip **Holy Symbol** or Vanish-prevention quartz on your healers. If your healer gets Vanished, the fight becomes nearly unwinnable.
2. Destroy Sacred Fragments immediately when they appear — use AoE arts
3. Keep Chrono Break in mind — have backup healing options
4. Use S-Crafts for burst damage phases between summon waves
5. Dispel boss buffs regularly
6. Use all consumables freely — this is the final fight in the game

**Recommended Party:** Rean, Emma/Elliot (healer with Vanish protection), Laura/Sara (physical DPS), Fie (speed/evasion)

<!-- checkpoint: corridor-complete | Reverie Corridor Complete -->

## Post-Corridor

Upon completion:
- Unlock powerful quartz and equipment rewards
- Special cutscenes with characters based on bonding levels
- Final save available for NG+ data transfer

> **New Game+ unlocks after completing the Epilogue.** Your clear save carries over levels, equipment, mira, and certain items.

<!-- checkpoint: epilogue-complete | Epilogue Complete — Game Clear -->

sections.title: New Game Plus & Cleanup
sections.content:
# New Game Plus & Cleanup

After completing the game, you unlock **New Game Plus** with carried-over levels, equipment, and mira. Two achievements are exclusive to NG+.

## NG+ Exclusive Achievements

> 🏆 **Achievement: Frozen Heart** — Start a New Game+ on Nightmare difficulty. Select Nightmare when prompted at the start of NG+. This stacks with Conquering Hero and Banisher of Nightmares if you haven't earned those yet.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Scholar of the Truth** — View all bonding events. This requires at least 2 playthroughs since you cannot see all bonding events in a single run (limited bonding points per chapter). Prioritize different characters each playthrough.

## NG+ Cleanup Checklist

Use NG+ to mop up any achievements missed on your first playthrough:

- **Lending Library**: Carry-over does NOT include books. Re-collect all volumes.
- **Wartime Rationer**: Recipe progress carries over. Cook any missing recipes.
- **The Reel Deal**: Fish progress carries over. Catch any species you missed.
- **Intelligence Agent**: Profile progress carries over. Talk to any NPCs you missed.
- **The Return of Rean QUARTZ-er**: Master quartz carry over. Focus on any missed in one-time dungeons.
- **Cumulative combat trophies**: All combat counters carry over. Keep grinding S-Breaks, Rush, Burst, and Overdrive.
- **Face of the Enemy**: Battle notebook carries over. Fight any missed monster types.

## Bonding Route Planning (for Scholar of the Truth)

With limited bonding points per chapter, plan your routes across 2+ playthroughs to cover all characters:

- **Playthrough 1**: Focus on Alisa, Laura, Fie, Emma, Jusis, Machias
- **Playthrough 2**: Focus on Elliot, Sara, Towa, Millium, Crow, and remaining events

Note: Some bonding events unlock unique scenes and dialogue but all must be viewed for the trophy.
